def negative_background_task_exception_unobserved():
    rule_id = "background_task_exception_unobserved"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Background task bindings with no obvious await, callback, supervisor, or observation path."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
